title: Telecommunications in Slovenia
content:
This article refers to Telecommunications in Slovenia. Telephone. Telephone s - number of subscribers: 200.266 analog subscribers, 517.284 VoIP subscribers (2016) Telephones - mobile cellular: 2.341.000 users, 1.784.266 paid subscriptions and 556.223 users of prepaid phones (2016), 100.5% mobile penetration (as of 2016) Telephone system: <br "general assessment:" well-developed telecommunications infrastructure <br "domestic:" combined fixed-line and mobile-cellular teledensity, roughly 150 telephones per 100 persons <br "international:" country code - 386 Radio.

<a href="Radio" Radio</a <a href="broadcasting" broadcast</a stations: AM 5, FM 53 (2016) Radios: 805,000 (1997) Television. <a href="Television" Television</a broadcast stations: 20 (2014) Televisions: 710,000 (1997) Internet.
